paypalExpress.testMode.title: Test Mode
paypalExpress.testMode.description: Uncheck this checkbox to work with your PayPal account credentials.

paypalExpress.sandboxClientId.title: PayPal Sandbox ID
paypalExpress.sandboxClientId.description: Client id for PayPal Sandbox account. This is mandatory if Test Mode is om.

paypalExpress.clientId.title: PayPal Client ID
paypalExpress.clientId.description: Your production client id for PayPal. Only will be used if Test Mode is off.

paypalExpress.buttonLabel.title: PayPal Button Type
paypalExpress.buttonLabel.description: Text to show as PayPal purchase buttton.

paypalExpress.fundingIcons.title: Show Funding Icons
paypalExpress.fundingIcons.description: Display card icons below the PayPal purchase button.
